since_last: 39% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.56%; AI bubble risk 57 Heating Up.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 39% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.42% · BTC -1.13% · Gold -0.60% · Nasdaq100 +0.33%. 39% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.56%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.56%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -2.21%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: MU is the standout at -5.11%
cards.body: Leaders: MDB +1.29%, INTU +1.10%, WDAY +1.04%, ADBE +1.02%, NOW +0.97%. Laggards: MU -5.11%, AMAT -3.57%, POWL -3.48%, LRCX -3.37%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -1.43% at $143.22
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -1.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 57 — Heating Up
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 57/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
